expected_behavior: Runs `git diff --staged` to inspect the staged changes before writing the message
Subject follows type(scope): description in imperative mood and is under 72 characters
Body lists the specific changes grouped by file or feature area
Does NOT include any Co-Authored-By line or mention of AI assistance

query: Make a commit for the staged bug fix in the date parser.
expected_behavior: Chooses the `fix` type (not feat) for a bug fix, with an appropriate scope
Subject is imperative and under 72 characters with no trailing period

query: Commit my staged changes: a dependency bump plus a docs tweak.
expected_behavior: Selects a sensible type such as chore
Body groups the dependency change and the docs change as separate, specific bullet points
Omits any Co-Authored-By or AI-generated attribution lines
